hero.title: Construction Project Creation Redesign
hero.subtitle: Optimizing on-site data capture to reduce drop-off rates.

context.title: Context & Challenges
context.project: Project: redesign of the construction creation flow for ChantierPro (Construction SaaS). The goal was to simplify a complex workflow while respecting industry habits.
context.methodology: Methodology: 4-day design challenge, using AI assistance for strategic analysis and workflow efficiency.
objectives: Identify key friction points in the current journey
Deliver a high-fidelity prototype ready for testing

discovery.title: Step 01: Discovery & Strategy
discovery.intro: To prepare the design phase, I combined market research and Synthetic User interviews to align field needs with business stakes.

market.title: Secondary Research (Perplexity)
points: 10% of project budgets lost due to organizational defects.
12 to 16 hours per week spent on admin tasks.
60% to 80% drop-off on overly complex forms.

personas.title: Synthetic Users (simulated interviews)
personas.gaspard: Gaspard — Unstable connection on site, prefers entering data calmly in the evening or at the office.
personas.nadia: Nadia — Uses her phone one-handed with gloves; needs a simple, guided interface.

insights.business: Stopping financial loss: around 10% of a project’s budget is lost due to poor organization.
insights.user: Simplify to retain: 60% to 80% of users drop off when the form becomes too long or complex.
